question: Which AWS service provides scalable object storage in the cloud?
explanation: Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service) is an object storage service that offers industry-leading scalability, data availability, security, and performance.

question: Which of the following is the AWS shared responsibility model concept that describes customer responsibility?
explanation: In the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, customers are responsible for 'Security IN the cloud', which includes data, identity, and application-level security.

question: Which pricing model allows customers to save up to 72% compared to On-Demand pricing in exchange for a 1 or 3 year commitment?
explanation: Reserved Instances provide a significant discount (up to 72%) compared to On-Demand pricing in exchange for a 1 or 3-year usage commitment.

question: Which AWS service enables you to run code without provisioning or managing servers?
explanation: AWS Lambda lets you run code without provisioning or managing servers. You pay only for the compute time you consume.

question: Which of the following are benefits of cloud computing? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.text: Trade capital expense for variable expense

options.label: B
options.text: Increased time to market due to manual provisioning

options.label: C
options.text: Benefit from massive economies of scale

explanation: Key cloud computing benefits include trading capital expense for variable expense and benefiting from massive economies of scale achieved by cloud providers.

question: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)
explanation: Reliability and Performance Efficiency are two of the six pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

question: Which AWS services can be used to decouple application components? (Choose two.)
explanation: Amazon SQS (Simple Queue Service) and Amazon SNS (Simple Notification Service) are messaging services used to decouple application components.

question: Which of the following are characteristics of the AWS global infrastructure? (Choose three.)
explanation: The AWS global infrastructure is made up of Regions, Availability Zones, and Edge Locations. These provide redundancy, low latency, and global reach.
